commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://efa-validation-<AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>/scripts/mpi-debug-inner.sh /tmp/mpi-debug-inner.sh && chmod +x /tmp/mpi-debug-inner.sh'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio exec -n efa-validation nccl-tests-efa-launcher-2tjrv -- bash /tmp/mpi-debug-inner.sh 2>&1 | tail -100'
